channel.title: MA — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on MA (Mastercard) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: NEW POSITION MA (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) new position MA in Q4 2025 · 0.4% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Stephen Mandel)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED MA (-22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed MA in Q4 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)

item.title: François Rochon: ADDED MA (+6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: François Rochon (Giverny Capital) added MA in Q4 2025 · 11.2% of portfolio. Adding to 17-year Mastercard position.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (François Rochon)

item.title: Tom Slater: TRIMMED MA (-6%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Tom Slater (Baillie Gifford (Long Term Global Growth)) trimmed MA in Q4 2025 · 0.7% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Tom Slater)

item.title: Chuck Akre: ADDED MA (+4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Chuck Akre (Akre Capital Management) added MA in Q4 2025 · 17.8% of portfolio. Adding to Mastercard — long-time core.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Chuck Akre)
